title: hieracium vulgatum subsp. lachenalii
intro: Hieracium vulgatum subsp. lachenalii, also known as Hawkweed, is a type of flowering plant belonging to the dandelion family (Asteraceae). Traditionally, Hawkweed has been used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. It is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving pain and inflammation, and supporting the immune system. Hawkweed can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, although its effectiveness and safety should be confirmed through scientific research and medical consultation.
